name: plastic_waste_ship_return_basel_port_capacity_crisis
premise: Port director Casey Patel must decide whether to accept a returning flagged plastic-waste ship denied entry in another country when local landfill capacity is zero and incineration permits are frozen. Environmental lawyer Nico Frost threatens injunction if the ship docks. Sending it elsewhere may violate Basel consent rules if new destinations lack capacity. Leaving it offshore risks hull integrity in a coming nor'easter. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Environmental Trade. The dilemma is widely framed as a individual vs collective tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay. Casey Patel understands that Nico Frost will interpret the first public commitment as a signal about which obligations the organization treats as overriding when facts remain ambiguous.

agents.name: Casey Patel
agents.identity: I am the port director accountable for berth safety, international waste shipment law, and neighborhood odor and health complaints near alternative staging sites.
agents.goal: I want lawful disposal without becoming the world's plastic dumping ground again.

agents.name: Nico Frost
agents.identity: I am an environmental attorney representing frontline neighborhoods who will sue if the ship berths without certified downstream recycling contracts.
agents.goal: I want the ship held offshore with Coast Guard escort until multilateral re-export with verified end facilities is arranged, even if that exceeds nor'easter risk tolerance.

choices: I will allow emergency berthing at a remote military pier with sealed negative-pressure unloading and federal indemnity, accepting political explosion in the host city near the pier.
I will refuse berthing and coordinate high-seas ship-to-ship transfer to flagged vessels with verified recycling in Rotterdam, accepting Basel paperwork delays and hull risk during transfer.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Nor'easter track shifted six hours earlier on the latest run. Casey Patel must choose between emergency military pier berthing or high-seas transfer to Rotterdam-bound tonnage. What does Casey Patel do?
